title: 35-year-old woman stabbed in Syracuse, police say
summary: A 35-year-old woman was stabbed inside a residence in the 1100 block of South Townsend Street on Friday, June 27, 2026 at approximately 11:41 p.m. Syracuse Police Department responded to the incident. This crime report documents a public safety incident within city limits.
processing_notes: Victim age (35) and location (1100 block South Townsend Street) extracted; no suspect information provided in article
Article is crime report from local news source, not official city communication
